title: Free Tradeex prediction algorithm for everyone
author: Inner_Maintenance522
selftext:
Hi! I made this free to use online stock & crypto predicting algorithm. It's completely free and you can use it as much as you want as long as you post me feedback and things to improve ;) if you want to use it join r/tradeex or go to https://tradee-x.github.io

No signup at all required
School project - cannot promise any results but from internal testing its spot on ;)
